rulings.Case Title: ALICE FARRELLY VS. 3515-17-19 SACRAMENTO STREET HOMEOWNERS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for August 19, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT DONALD MITCHELL's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT continued to September 24, 2019. By no later than September 6, 2019 moving party to provide a supplemental brief limited to the following: (1) identify ANTI-SLAPP case(s) in the moving papers factually similar to the case at bar; and (2) specify which facts are analogous to the facts giving rise to the favorable decision in controlling authority referenced in section (1). If brief is non-responsive or exceeds the above-stated parameters, it will be stricken in its entirety. Opposing party may file a response to September 6, 2019 brief by September 17, 2019. = (501/REQ)
